name: monitor_market
description: Monitor a Polymarket market for trading alerts including price changes, whale trades, and arbitrage opportunities. Use this to track specific markets for significant events. For user profile tracking, use fetch_user_profile instead.

market.description: Market URL, slug, or numeric ID (e.g., 'trump-wins-2024' or 'https://polymarket.com/event/...')

threshold_price.description: Price change threshold to trigger alert (default: 5%)

threshold_whale.description: Whale trade threshold in USD to trigger alert (default: $5000)

json.description: Output result as JSON instead of formatted text

name: fetch_user_profile
description: Fetch Polymarket user profile data including positions, trades, and P&L. Use this to track a wallet's holdings and performance. For market monitoring, use monitor_market instead.

wallet.description: Wallet address (0x...) - can be extracted from profile URL like polymarket.com/profile/0x...

trades.description: Include trade history in the response

pnl.description: Include P&L history in the response

json.description: Output result as JSON instead of formatted text
